growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Plugge CM et al. Metabolic Flexibility of Sulfate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00081. [PMC3119409]
growth_records.snippet: Syntrophobacter pfennigii | Propionate 0.066 | Propionate + sulfate 0.063 | Wallrabenstein et al. (1995)
growth_records.notes: Table 1. Primary source cited = Wallrabenstein et al. (1995). Reported mu = 0.066 day-1 on propionate; mu_h = 0.066/24 = 0.00275 h-1; doubling_time = ln2/0.00275 = 252.1 h.

growth_records.cite: Plugge CM et al. Metabolic Flexibility of Sulfate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00081. [PMC3119409]
growth_records.snippet: Syntrophobacter pfennigii | Propionate + sulfate 0.063 day-1 | Wallrabenstein et al. (1995)
growth_records.notes: Table 1, propionate + sulfate. Primary source cited = Wallrabenstein et al. (1995). Reported mu = 0.063 day-1; mu_h = 0.063/24 = 0.002625 h-1; doubling_time = ln2/0.002625 = 264.1 h.
